raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What's felt most useful to get into the flow here so far?","description":"Opens with a safe, context-setting check-in on how Aisha is landing in week four.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision boundaries","name":"Where do the decision boundaries still feel fuzzy in your PM scope?","description":"Surfaces which calls she is unsure she can make versus where she needs alignment.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-functional moments","name":"Which cross-functional moments still slow you down the most?","description":"Finds the specific meeting or interaction patterns where uncertainty shows up.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment friction","name":"What part of running alignment is taking more effort than it should?","description":"Identifies where she is over-investing in consensus or decoding norms.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Partner expectations","name":"What expectations from partner teams are still hard to read?","description":"Surfaces unclear partner norms that make prioritization and tradeoff calls harder.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unspoken norms","name":"What unspoken norm here has been hardest to decode?","description":"Probes the hidden rules she is spending energy figuring out.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support from me","name":"Where would a clearer call from me help you most?","description":"Makes room for concrete manager support on boundaries and escalation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Ends on practical next steps and support needed to make onboarding smoother.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
